title: Health Educator
description: ICON is seeking a Health Educator to develop and deliver health education programs for clinical study participants. You'll create educational materials, conduct presentations, and support patient engagement in research. Work onsite in Boulder for a leading clinical research organization advancing healthcare innovation.
responsibilities: Develop and deliver health education programs for study participants
Conduct presentations and group education sessions
Track participant engagement and program outcomes
Support study compliance through patient education

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Public Health, Health Education, or related field
